examples: She succeeded in persuading us all
I managed to carry the box upstairs
She pulled it off, even though we never thought her capable of it
The pianist negociated the difficult runs

meanings.definition: transfer by endorsement to another in return for value received
succeed in passing through, around, or over
examples: The hiker negociated the high mountain pass

meanings.definition: confer with another in order to come to terms or reach an agreement
discuss the terms of an arrangement
examples: They negotiated the sale of the house
